title: CINQCARE Teams with Humana to Provide In-Home Care
text: NEW YORK , Nov. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CINQCARE, a company committed to deliver health and care where you live, with a deep commitment to Black and Brown communities, and leading health and well-being company Humana Inc. (NYSE: HUM), are teaming up to serve Medicare Advantage members throughout New York. Together, the two companies, which share a dedication to comprehensive, whole-person health solutions, aim to improve healthcare challenges and close gaps in specific communities in the state.

title: Value-Based Care Benefits Patients and Physicians, New Report Shows
text: LOUISVILLE, Ky.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Value-based care is smarter healthcare that lowers costs and keeps Medicare Advantage members healthier, according to the tenth annual Value-Based Care Report released today from Humana Inc. (NYSE: HUM). The 2023 report shows that Medicare Advantage (MA) patients receiving care under value-based arrangements spent more time with their primary care physician and were more likely to receive preventive care, with fewer hospitalizations. title: Humana's (HUM) CenterWell Unit Plans Expansion in Indiana
text: Humana's (HUM) CenterWell brand will open four senior-focused primary care centers across Indianapolis in order to address the unique needs of the area's senior population.

title: Humana Completes Aggregate $1.35 Billion Debt Offering
text: LOUISVILLE, Ky.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Humana Inc. (the “company”) (NYSE: HUM) announced today the completion of its public offering of $1.35 billion in aggregate principal amount of senior notes. These senior notes are comprised of $500 million of the company's 5.750 percent senior notes, due 2028, at 99.830 percent of the principal amount, and $850 million of the company's 5.950 percent senior notes, due 2034, at 98.525 percent of the principal amount (collectively, the “Senior Notes Offerings”).

title: Humana Prices $1.35 Billion Debt Offering
text: LOUISVILLE, Ky.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Humana Inc. (the “company”) (NYSE: HUM) announced today that it has priced a public offering of $1.35 billion in aggregate principal amount of senior notes. These senior notes are comprised of $500 million of the company's 5.750 percent senior notes, due 2028, at 99.830 percent of the principal amount, and $850 million of the company's 5.950 percent senior notes, due 2034, at 98.525 percent of the principal amount (collectively, the “Senior Notes Offerings”). title: Humana (HUM) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Humana (HUM) came out with quarterly earnings of $7.78 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $7.15 per share. This compares to earnings of $6.88 per share a year ago.

title: Humana Q3 net income, revenue beats analyst estimate
text: Humana Inc.'s stock HUM rose 0.3% in premarket trading on Wednesday after the health insurance company's third-quarter net income and revenue beat analyst estimates. Humana said its third-quarter profit fell to $1.1 billion, or $6.71 a share, from $1.3 billion, or $9.39 a share, in the year-ago quarter.

title: Humana beats quarterly profit estimates
text: Humana Inc on Wednesday beat Wall Street estimates for quarterly profit aided by a better-than-expected performance of its government-backed insurance plans.

title: Humana Reports Third Quarter 2023 Financial Results; Affirms Full Year 2023 Adjusted EPS Guidance
